g.text: Technical Architecture · 11 layers · Bilingual EN / RU · July 2026
Human-facing interfaces and machine access points — live analytics, dashboards, control panels, and programmatic
Security and governance backbone — every request is authenticated, authorised and logged; holds global config,
Discovery, ingestion and distribution of every camera stream — connect via industry protocols, split frames to AI,
The computer-vision heart — deep-learning models detect, classify, track and interpret objects, people, vehicles and
Persistent, structured memory of every tracked entity — identities, histories, trajectories and relationships turned
Turns perception into action — configurable rules and factory logic evaluate scenarios, detect violations, drive
The business-capability layer — focused services that translate perception and decisions into concrete factory
The real-time nervous system — every meaningful occurrence is published as a discrete event any service can subscribe
Delivers alerts and events to people and systems across every relevant channel — from an on-screen banner to an ERP
The persistence foundation — each store chosen for a data type and access pattern: relational, cache, media, time-
The enterprise and industrial systems the platform integrates with — drawing context and pushing results back into the

svg.text: Data Flow rises up the left edge (pixels → insight) · Events & Notifications descend the right edge (decisions → action), closing the perception-to-action loop.
